_comment: Routine config manifest. Source of truth for the routine's API-recreatable fields. The prompt body itself lives in prompt.md; recreate.sh splices it in at deploy time. Web-UI-only fields (env vars, setup script, GitHub event triggers, API bearer tokens) are NOT captured here — see README.md.
name: Bug fix routine — terraform-provider-claude-managed-agents
_cron_comment: 04:00 UTC = 06:00 Europe/Berlin in CEST (summer), 05:00 in CET (winter). Cron is not DST-aware. Edit if you'd rather lock to wall-clock winter time.

ccr._environment_id_comment: Default cloud environment. Update via web UI to attach a custom environment that has ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and the env-setup.sh setup script.

session_context._model_comment: Bump to claude-opus-4-7 in the web UI if fix quality on a Go provider codebase is mediocre.
